name: @akashrajpurohit/gsc-mcp
description: A safe, local, read-only MCP server that gives your AI assistant access to your Google Search Console data.
author: Akash Rajpurohit

scripts.version: node --input-type=commonjs -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=require('./package.json').version;if(!fs.readFileSync('CHANGELOG.md','utf8').includes('## ['+v+']')){console.error('CHANGELOG.md has no ## ['+v+'] section. Add it and commit before running npm version.');process.exit(1)}"
